questionHtml: Non-polar solvents can be toxic. Suggest a modification to the experiment which allows the evaporated solvent to be collected.
markschemeHtml:
distillation «instead of evaporation» ✔

Accept “pass vapour through a condenser and collect liquid”.

Do not accept “condensation” without experimental details.

meta.title: Non-polar solvents can be toxic. Suggest a modification to the experiment which allows the evaporated solvent to be collected.
